summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Prachurja admin dashboard functionality. Backend admin APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend admin interface functional with one modal overlay UI issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks navigation clicks when product form modal is open
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot navigate to other admin pages while product form modal is open - must close modal first

passed_tests: Backend: All 28 API tests passed including admin authentication and CRUD operations
Admin login with correct credentials (admin@prachurja.in / Prachurja@2026)
Admin login error handling for wrong credentials
Admin dashboard loads with stats cards (Revenue: Rs.6,288, Orders: 4, Products: 5, Messages: 6)
Admin dashboard shows recent orders table
Admin sidebar navigation to Dashboard, Orders, Products pages
Admin orders page loads with filter buttons (All, Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled)
Admin products page loads with Add Product button
Product form modal opens correctly with all required fields
Admin products table displays existing products
Unauthenticated access to /admin redirects to /admin/login
Admin authentication protection working (401 for unauthorized access)
Admin login page displays email and password fields
Admin logout functionality working
Backend admin dashboard stats endpoint returns correct data structure
Backend admin orders list and filtering working
Backend admin products CRUD operations (create, update, delete) working
Backend admin contacts list working
Backend admin authentication (login/logout/me) working with httpOnly cookies
Backend admin authorization protection working for all admin endpoints
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in ProductFormModal - the overlay is blocking navigation clicks when the modal is open. Users should be able to close the modal by clicking outside or ensure the overlay doesn't interfere with sidebar navigation.
